createPR.description: Create a pull request on GitHub

fetchPRComments.description: Fetch review comments from a pull request

mergePR.description: Merge a pull request with squash

phases.label: Ship
phases.promptTemplate: Create a conventional commit, push the branch '{branchName}' to origin, and open a pull request against '{defaultBranch}' with a clear title and description summarizing the changes.

phases.label: PR Feedback
phases.promptTemplate: Review the PR feedback comments and apply the requested changes. After fixing, push the updates to the same branch.
